title: Coding Zeal — sprawling 2019 todo dump
html:
TL;DR

  • Loose to-do list from Nov 2019, age ~16, blending Hamilton homework, fbla prep, osu college dreams, Amazon FBA hustle, brenda aguilera talks, Chinese class recordings, and a "father destroyer of worlds" line that prefigures lineage as fate.
  • First documented appearance of the question that recurs through Yahir's notes: "Improving the human condition — what is the human condition?"
  • Costco contacts and "Mecha involvement with Calvin" — early signal of yahir family-restaurant-adjacent hustle thinking, plus engineering-club orientation.
  • Reference to "the college dreams lady who's brother works in AI" — the AI thread is already on his radar in 2019, predating yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 by 3 years.
  • Title is "Coding Zeal" but the content is everything-but-coding — telling about how he uses titles vs the actual content of his notes (chronic mismatch).

Key quotes

"Improving the human condition / -what is the human condition ?"

"Father Destroyer of Worlds / -Araceli family's time dust"

"Get a grasp of the college dreams lady who's brother works in AI"

"Talk to Mom and Dad about the difficult topics, so that down the road Emilio and I will know (include yermers)"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Earliest extant "AI is interesting" data point — the lady-with-brother-in-AI line. Track this against yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 (the 2022→2026 arc).
  • "Talk to Mom and Dad about the difficult topics" — at age ~16 he's already designating himself as the family knowledge-broker who must extract context from parents on behalf of emilio and Yermers. Relevant to yahir family dynamic.
  • The Hamilton/Mecha/FBA/Costco mix is the clean teen specimen of his "everything everywhere all at once" working style — same shape as the 2024 2024 07 04 questions mega-list.

Open questions

  • Who is "the college dreams lady"? Did Yahir actually pursue the AI lead at 16?
  • Was the "Father Destroyer of Worlds / Araceli family's time dust" a creative writing project or a family-history thing?
  • Did the Costco contacts ever turn into the FBA hustle?

Wikilinks
